name: Shreyans Soni
title: AI Engineer | Developer | Content
aboutHtml: I am Shreyans Soni, BITS Pilani graduate, with over 2 years of experience in AI and Systems Engineering. With having discovered special interest in creation, development and writing, I have been trying to build meaningful and solve problems in the intersection of technology and human experience. I do also like to tinker with electronic components, making sounds using guitar and hit a shuttle with a racket.
